prompt_text:
### Demographics: 49-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.5 kg; Height 166.3 cm; BMI 21.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 248mg/dL; 9 months ago 172mg/dL; 6 months ago 198mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.8kg; 9 months ago 60.1kg; 6 months ago 59.8kg; 3 months ago 54.7kg; current 59.5kg), Height (12 months ago 166.3cm; 9 months ago 166.3cm; 6 months ago 166.3cm; 3 months ago 166.3cm; current 166.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 48mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 287mg/g; 9 months ago 264mg/g; 6 months ago 349mg/g; 3 months ago 244mg/g; current 254mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 67mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 67mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 33mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 106mg/dL; current 101mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.6g/dL; current 13.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.91 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
